title: podman rpm Spec fixes
body:
Misc fixes to the spec file: add a missing ` and remove unnecessarily added files

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

@dcermak could you please amend your commit with a `[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]` in the body of your commit message and repush? Something like: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/19333/commits/49257a3c506ebdab2dd970931bdf6dca1c000a1c
